rulings.Case Title: SRG PACIFIC MGMT LLC DBA COVENTRY PLACE VS. JANELLE JANSSEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 3, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF SRG PACIFIC MGMT LLC DBA COVENTRY PLACE Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees GRANTED in the amount of $8,980 (amount calculated using loadstar method for hours and hourly rates; Lori Ferguson 2 hours at $640/hour; Payam Saljoughian 20 hours at $350/hour; Laurel O'Connor and Lori Moody 7 hours at $100/hour). = (501/CFH)
